title: Notorious Concubines
writer: Atsushi Yamatoya, James E. McLarty, Shin-Chen Wang
actors: Tomoko Mayama, Shikokyu Takashima, Jûzô Itami
plot: A Chinese woman is not content with just one man and seduces several for lust and sex. This behaviour and needs accelerate to the point that she definitively gets rid of one man to gain the other. She is now the wife of a man with...
